title: taraxacum gibberosum
intro: Taraxacum gibberosum is a lesser-known species within the dandelion family, known for its distinctive hairy leaves and stems. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Health benefits of Taraxacum gibberosum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum gibberosum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
